message:
fix: append null bitmap support — stop coercing null int/float/string to 0/""

rowsToColumnArrays now builds a validity bitmap (bit set = valid) for
columns containing null/undefined values instead of silently replacing
them with 0, 0n, or "".  buildFragment passes the bitmap pointer to
WASM fragmentAdd*Column (previously always 0).

FragmentColumn gains a nullBitmap?: Uint8Array field.  Capacity estimate
includes bitmap bytes.  8 new tests cover all dtypes + mixed-column case.
